mapper.select:
select course_no, course_title, course_content, (select member_name from member_tbl where member_id = c.course_writer) as course_writer, (select count(course_index) from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = c.course_no) as course_count, (select attraction_thumb from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = c.course_no and course_index = (select min(course_index) from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = c.course_no)) as course_thumb, (select count(member_id) from course_like_tbl where course_no = c.course_no and member_id = #{memberId}) as is_like from course_tbl c
order by (select count(member_id) from course_like_tbl where course_no = c.course_no) desc, course_no desc
order by course_no desc
offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only

select (select course_writer from course_tbl where course_no = #{courseNo}) as course_writer, attraction_title, attraction_summary, attraction_thumb, attraction_addr, course_index, (select member_name from member_tbl where member_id = (select course_writer from course_tbl where course_no = #{courseNo})) as course_writer_name, (select count(member_id) from course_like_tbl where course_no = #{courseNo}) as like_count, (select course_content from course_tbl where course_no = #{courseNo}) as course_content from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = #{courseNo} order by course_index asc
mapper.delete: delete from course_like_tbl where course_no = #{courseNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
select attraction_no, attraction_addr, attraction_thumbnail as attraction_thumb, attraction_summary, attraction_phone, attraction_title, (select count(*) from attraction_wish_tbl where member_id = #{memberId} and attraction_no = a.attraction_no) as is_like from attraction_tbl a where (select area_no from area_tbl where area_name = #{category}) = (select area_no from sigungu_tbl where sigungu_no = a.sigungu_no)
and attraction_title like '%'||#{keyword}||'%'
and attraction_no in (select attraction_no from attraction_wish_tbl where member_id = #{memberId})
select member_name from member_tbl where member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert:
insert into course_attraction_tbl values ( course_attraction_seq.nextval, #{courseNo}, #{courseIndex}, #{attractionNo}, #{attractionTitle}, #{attractionSummary},
null,
#{attractionThumb},
#{attractionAddr} )
mapper.select: select course_title from course_tbl where course_no = #{courseNo}
select course_no, course_title, course_content from course_tbl where course_no = #{corseNo}

select course_no, course_index, attraction_no, attraction_title, attraction_summary, attraction_thumb, attraction_addr from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = #{courseNo} order by course_index asc
select count(member_id) from course_like_tbl where course_no = #{courseNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
select count(*) from course_like_tbl where member_id = #{memberId}

select course_no, course_title, course_content, (select member_name from member_tbl where member_id = c.course_writer) as course_writer, (select count(course_index) from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = c.course_no) as course_count, (select attraction_thumb from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = c.course_no and course_index = (select min(course_index) from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = c.course_no)) as course_thumb, 1 as is_like from course_tbl c where course_no in (select course_no from course_like_tbl where member_id = #{memberId})
order by course_no desc
order by course_no asc
offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only

select course_no, course_title, course_content, (select member_name from member_tbl where member_id = c.course_writer) as course_writer, (select count(course_index) from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = c.course_no) as course_count, (select attraction_thumb from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = c.course_no and course_index = (select min(course_index) from course_attraction_tbl where course_no = c.course_no)) as course_thumb, (select count(*) from course_like_tbl where course_no = c.course_no and member_id = #{memberId}) as is_like from course_tbl c where course_writer = #{memberId}
order by course_no desc
order by course_no asc
offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
